breaks.issue: Domain-Mismatch: Contracts=14 Business-Domains vs Authority=10 Layer-Domains
breaks.detail: Authority nutzt RFC-000 Layer-Domains (CORE, SERVICES), Contracts nutzen Business-Domains (KERNEL, IDENTITY)

breaks.issue: Intelligence validate.js nutzt parallel ARCHITECTURE_RULES statt nur Policies
